title: PAE Contable — Multi-Agent Colombian Accounting
description: Sistema multi-agente para automatizar contabilidad y compliance tributario colombiano. Backend FastAPI con supervisor LangGraph que orquesta agentes (ingest, contador, tributario) sobre un RAG híbrido (BM25 + pgvector BGE-M3 + reranker bge-v2-m3, 107 docs normativos). Genera borradores DIAN F300 (IVA), F350 (Retefuente), F110 (Renta PJ) e ICA municipal con calendario DIAN 2026. Workflows durables vía Inngest (HITL, fan-out, throttling OpenAI). Frontend Next.js 14 + MUI con uploads, trazas de pipeline en español y reportes financieros (Balance General, Estado de Resultados).

title: DinoRAG - Autonomous Multi-Agent RAG for Dinosaurs
description: Sistema RAG Autónomo con agentes especializados para responder preguntas sobre dinosaurios usando un corpus de 100+ documentos científicos. Incluye clasificación, recuperación, generación y validación automática con LangChain y Groq.

title: Routine Schemer
description: Plataforma Profesional de Planificación Integral de Entrenamientos. Una aplicación web completa para diseñar, estructurar y gestionar programas de entrenamiento, enfocada en profesionales del fitness y atletas serios. Completamente migrado a Supabase: Backend PostgreSQL con autenticación, RLS security, y real-time sync.

title: AI Accounting Agent - Autonomous Business Accounting System
description: Intelligent accounting assistant powered by LangGraph autonomous agent with state machine architecture. Implements ReAct pattern for multi-step planning, self-reflection, and automatic error correction. Features autonomous task decomposition, tool orchestration (SQL + semantic search), and persistent memory. Combines FAISS vector database for document retrieval with SQLite for structured data.

title: Gym App
description: Aplicación móvil integral de fitness desarrollada en Flutter. Incluye seguimiento de rutinas, planes nutricionales, visualización de progreso con gráficos y autenticación segura con Firebase. Cuenta con un dashboard intuitivo y gestión de perfiles.

title: Interactive 3D Protein Visualizer with AI Assistant
description: Web-based interactive tool for visualizing and analyzing protein structures in 3D with integrated LangGraph AI agent for assistance and consultation. Features intelligent query answering about protein structures, residue analysis, and molecular properties. Combines traditional molecular visualization (PDB loading, interactive selection, customizable representations) with RAG-powered conversational interface for educational and research support.

title: Tuberculosis Detection with Deep Learning
description: AI-assisted diagnostic system classifying chest X-rays for Tuberculosis using Transfer Learning and CNNs. Focus on high sensitivity to minimize false negatives.

title: Medical AI Dashboard - XGBoost Literature Classification
description: Dashboard for automatic classification of medical literature into 4 categories using XGBoost. Real-time API, interactive visualizations, 3,565 real samples. 2nd Place National Contest.

title: Catch the Snitch - Quidditch Betting System
description: Full-stack web app simulating a betting system for Quidditch matches (Harry Potter-inspired). Real-time simulation, user management, and admin panel.

title: Quotation Management System
description: Web platform for managing quotes, clients, and documents. Supports creation, versioning, and visualization of project/service quotes.
